entries.description:
The errors "Property '...' does not exist on type 'JSX.IntrinsicElements'" occur because components `CityMarker` and `Globe` are typed with `React.FC`. `React.FC` expects a return type of `React.ReactElement`, but react-three-fiber components return special objects, not standard React elements. This type mismatch prevents TypeScript from correctly applying the JSX namespace augmentation for react-three-fiber's custom elements.

The fix is to remove the `React.FC` type from `CityMarker` and `Globe` components, allowing TypeScript to infer their return types correctly. I've also defined prop types for these components for better type safety and readability.
